name: agent-pays-agent
description: An interactive pixel-art cartoon where two agents make a buy/sell paid over x402 and signed on a Ledger device.
comment:optionalDependencies: Only needed for real Ledger CLEAR signing (USE_REAL_SIGNER=true); loaded lazily and optional so a failed/omitted install never breaks the simulated build. The official Ledger SDK (@ledgerhq/hw-app-eth) streams the full EIP-712 message to Speculos for clear signing; its CommonJS build is loaded via createRequire because the ESM build is broken under Node. ethers computes/verifies the typed data. See docs/speculos.md.
